title: corylus kweichowensis var. sutchuenensis
intro: Corylus kweichowensis var. sutchuenensis is a lesser-known species of hazelnut, commonly referred to as a type of hazel tree native to China. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as digestive issues and fever. The health benefits associated with Corylus kweichowensis var. sutchuenensis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
